hooks.command: echo 'SESSION DEBRIEF REMINDER — Before ending this session, check the Session Debrief section in CLAUDE.md: 1) Update task statuses 2) Create learning subtasks under parent tasks 3) Note process improvements as ops tasks 4) Flag follow-ups. Only act on this if the session involved substantive work and is wrapping up.'
echo 'CONTEXT COMPACTION — Run Session Debrief NOW: 1) Update task statuses 2) Create learning subtasks 3) Note improvements as ops tasks 4) Flag follow-ups'
